name: child/features-2
title: Aura Solis Features 2
description: Inner page feature grid boasting a horizontal timeline separator and split columns.

feature1_desc.default: With 50 acres of untouched shoreline at your doorstep, your personal space is measured in horizons, not square footage.

feature2_desc.default: From forest-to-table dining to meditative shoreline rituals, we craft moments that resonate long after the sun sets behind the peaks.

feature3_desc.default: Eliminate the noise of third-party bookings. Direct guests enjoy our most flexible cancellation policies and a dedicated concierge from moment one.
